mapper.select: select id, merchant_id, name, theme, status, price, description from campus_package where merchant_id = #{merchantId} order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into campus_package (merchant_id, name, theme, status, price, description) values (#{merchantId}, #{name}, #{theme}, #{status}, #{price}, #{description})
mapper.update: update campus_package set merchant_id = #{merchantId}, name = #{name}, theme = #{theme}, status = #{status}, price = #{price}, description = #{description} where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into campus_package_dish (package_id, dish_id, quantity) values (#{packageId}, #{dishId}, #{quantity})
